clips.title: Add Shock/Leak Elements to Titles
clips.body: Your top performer (1300 views) lacks drama hooks, while BKVC's #1 viral (42.3M views) leads with 'Leaks' and '😱'. Replace neutral titles like 'Agent Rates Emily' with conflict-driven formats: 'Kai EXPOSES Speed's [thing]' or '[Streamer] RE

clips.title: Post Daily at Peak Hours, Not Sporadic
clips.body: You posted 7 Shorts in 7 days but unevenly (2 same day, gaps of 0-1d). WClipMedia and Stream Vortex dominate by posting 1-2 consistent daily Shorts. Shift to daily 6pm-8pm posts and track which day/time your 1300-view Short was posted—repli

clips.title: Mine Comparison & Ranking Formats Winners Use
clips.body: RiftRanks' 'Ranking [Creator] Funniest Moment' (11.7M views) and WClipMedia's ranked compilations outperform your single-moment clips. Create 3-5 Shorts using 'Top 3 Kai vs Speed Moments' or 'Ranking [Streamer]'s Wildest Reactions'—these fo

stories.title: Lead with danger or plot twist in first 2 words
stories.body: Top performer 'Don't Accept That Request😰' hooks immediately with threat. Your titles bury the hook ('The Broken Toilet Disaster'). Test: Start with 'POV:', 'DON'T:', or 'WAIT:' — niche leaders use these 80% of the time. Your current 6-view

stories.title: Match niche discovery tags (#redditstories #pov #horrors)
stories.body: Your #Shorts tag is generic; top creators use #redditstories, #textingstory, #horrors, #pov. You're in 'minecraft parkour story time pov reddit' but titles never mention Reddit or POV. Reframe 2-3 shorts weekly with '#redditstories #pov #ho

stories.title: Post 1 short every 2 days, not 6 per week
stories.body: You're posting 6/week but averaging 6 views each—spreading too thin. Niche leaders post 2-3/week and hit 8K–52K views per Short. Consolidate to 3 posts/week with tighter hooks and hashtags; this gives each more algorithmic runway and lets y

characters.title: Add Visual Hook Format Like Leaders
characters.body: Top creators use ALL CAPS + VS format ("TRALALERO TRALALA VS BOMBARDIRO CROCODILO") and add emoji or brackets—your titles are lowercase narrative prose. Your best performer (50 views) still lacks the punchy cap-lock clash format; reframe "C

characters.title: Narrow to Core Character Battles
characters.body: Leaders obsess over 2-3 character matchups (Tralalero vs Bombardiro repeats across their top 6 Shorts). You're scattering across Cappuccino, Tung Tung, Sahur, and crocodile angles—diluting focus. Pick ONE core rivalry (e.g., Cappuccino vs B
